title: About Me!
Description: Hey! My name's William Chiu and I'm a Second Year Software Engineer at the University of Waterloo. I have an interest in Finance and Artificial Intelligence. I am currently working at the Waterloo Computer Vision Lab as a Undergraduate Research Assistant under the supervision of Maria Koshkina.  When I'm not busy with work, you can find me at the gym, playing the piano, or eating out with friends!
